title: DEXHUNT
description: A Minecraft PvP mod inspired by Dexter, where players must find and hunt hidden killers.
body:
# 🩸 DexHunt — A Deadly Game of Deception

**DexHunt** transforms Minecraft multiplayer into a *Dexter*-inspired PvP investigation game where trust means nothing, and every kill counts.  
One player becomes **Dexter**, the cold-blooded hunter. Others are **Potentials**, who can turn into **Killers** after certain conditions are met.  
Your goal depends on your role — but remember: only **Dexter’s personal kills** truly matter.

> 🧩 **Minecraft:** 1.21.1 (Forge)  
> 📦 **File:** `dexhunt-1.0.0.jar`  
> 👤 **Created by:** [@atenshi_](https://youtube.com/@atenshi_)

---

![DexHunt Gameplay](https://imgur.com/NHZGRQY)
🎬 [Watch the Official Trailer and Gameplay on YouTube](https://youtu.be/-ONRRsPKpw4?si=3gN0brMTSYcCIC9h)

---

## ⚔️ Core Gameplay

- **Dexter** — The vigilante killer hunter. Must eliminate every Killer **personally** to win.  
  Uses a **Dexter Knife** and **Syringe** for tracking and stunning targets.
- **Potentials** — Regular players who can become **Killers** by killing **1 player** or **20 mobs**.
- Once activated:
  - They are tagged as **[KILLER]** in the TAB list.
  - Every Dexter receives a **Killer Compass** pointing directly at them.

---

## 🧭 Killer Compass System

The compass is a key mechanic in **DexHunt** and behaves intelligently:

- When a Killer is active, Dexter gains a **Killer Compass** for that player.
- If a Killer dies by **Dexter’s hand**, their compass **disappears permanently** (they’re put into Spectator mode).
- If a Killer dies from **anything else** (fall damage, mobs, other players, etc.), the compass:
  - **Stays** in Dexter’s inventory or  
  - **Returns** automatically if removed when the Killer isn’t a spectator.
- Dexter keeps all his compasses unless **he** delivers the kill.

---

## 💀 Victory Conditions

- 🩸 **Dexter Wins** — only when *all Killers are personally killed by Dexter*.  
  No automatic win from natural or indirect deaths.
- 🔪 **Killers Win** — when they collectively reach a kill goal (default: **200 mob kills**).
- ♻️ The game resets automatically at round end (roles cleared, compasses removed, UI reset).

---

## 🛠️ Commands

DexHunt uses a simple role management command system:

### Base Command

```
/dexrole <player> <dexter|info|none|potential|reset>
```

> Requires operator permissions unless configured otherwise.

---

### 🔴 `/dexrole <player> dexter`

Assigns the selected player as **Dexter**.

- Grants full Dexter abilities  
- Provides access to:
  - **Dexter Knife**
  - **Syringe**
  - **Killer Compasses** (when Killers exist)  
- Overrides the player’s previous role  

---

### 🟡 `/dexrole <player> potential`

Sets the player as a **Potential**.

- Default progression role  
- Can become a Killer by:
  - Killing 1 player, or  
  - Killing 20 mobs  

---

### ⚪ `/dexrole <player> none`

Resets the player to the **default neutral role**.

- This is the starting role for all players  
- No special abilities  
- No tracked progression  

---

### 📊 `/dexrole <player> info`

Displays detailed information about the selected player:

- Current role  
- Player kill count  
- Mob kill count  
- Whether they are currently an active Killer  
- Number of executions performed using the **Dexter Knife**

Useful for admins and round monitoring.

---

### 🔄 `/dexrole <player> reset`

Fully resets the selected player's stored data:

- Role cleared  
- Player kill count reset  
- Mob kill count reset  
- Killer status removed  
- Dexter Knife execution statistics cleared  

Ideal for restarting rounds or correcting administrative mistakes.

---

## ⚙️ Key Features

- 🎭 Dual-role gameplay (Dexter vs. Killers)
- 🧭 Dynamic compass tracking logic
- 💬 Smart round and spectator handling
- 🩸 Dexter-exclusive weapon system (Knife, Syringe)
- 📊 Persistent role and kill data between deaths
- 🧠 Inspired by *Dexter*’s moral gray world

---

## 🧩 Compatibility

- Minecraft **1.21.1 (Forge)**
- Works in singleplayer and multiplayer  
- Supports any Forge-compatible modpack  
- Lightweight; minimal performance impact

---

## 📸 Gallery

![DexHunt Screenshot](https://imgur.com/2LFSz3T)

---

## 🎥 Content Creators

If you use **DexHunt** in a video or stream, please **credit and tag** the creator!

- **Credit line:**  
  `Mod: DexHunt by @atenshi_`
- **YouTube:** [youtube.com/@atenshi_](https://youtube.com/@atenshi_)  
- **Instagram:** [instagram.com/atenshii_](https://instagram.com/atenshii_)  
- Add a link to the Modrinth page in your description (once published).  
- Tag me — I’ll feature your video on my socials!

---

## 🧠 Notes & Tips

- Dexter’s special items (Knife & Syringe) are **saved across deaths** and restored on respawn.  
- If you use plugins or mods that interfere with Spectator mode, compass removal might behave differently.  
- All round logic resets automatically when victory is declared.

---

## 📜 License & Credits

- Developed by **atenshi_**
- Inspired by *Dexter* (Showtime) — not affiliated with the series.
- Free to play and record — credit is appreciated! ❤️

### 🧾 Example Changelog

**v1.0.0**
- Added Dexter & Potential role system  
- Implemented dynamic Killer Compass logic  
- Added Dexter Knife & Syringe  
- Spectator-based compass removal system  
- Round reset & win conditions  
- Optimized scoreboard and message handling
